name: Validation Error Summary
description: An error summary displayed at the top of a form step when validation fails. Lists all errors with anchor links to the problematic fields, helping users quickly identify and fix issues.
whenToUse: When form validation fails on continue/submit
To provide a summary of all errors at the top of the page
When users need quick navigation to error fields
For forms with multiple required fields that may have errors

components.name: Error Container
components.usage: Red border accent, light red background, prominent placement

components.name: Error Heading
components.purpose: Alert users to the presence of errors
components.usage: Standard heading like 'There is a problem'

components.name: Error List
components.usage: Unordered list with anchor links to each field

structure.container: Visually distinct error box with emergency/red styling
structure.heading: Clear heading indicating problems exist
structure.list: Bulleted list of errors, each linking to its field

example.description: Error summary component with focus management and anchor links

variants.name: Using GoabCallout
variants.description: Use the GoabCallout component with type='emergency' for consistent styling

variants.name: Single error
variants.description: When only one field has an error, can simplify to inline message

variants.name: Sectioned errors
variants.description: Group errors by form section for longer forms

considerations: Focus the error summary when it first appears (tabIndex=-1 + focus())
Use role='alert' for screen reader announcement
Error messages should describe what went wrong AND how to fix it
Link text should match the field label for recognition
Clicking links should focus AND scroll to the field
Keep error messages concise and actionable
Use consistent heading text ('There is a problem')
Place summary above the form, not below
Don't show summary until user attempts to continue

errorMessageGuidelines.format: Enter a valid [field type] (e.g., 'Enter a valid postal code')

accessibilityRequirements: Container must have role='alert' or role='alertdialog'
Container must be focusable (tabIndex=-1) for focus management
Links must have accessible names matching visible text
Color must not be only indicator - use icon or text as well
Error message text must also appear on the individual field
